name: roboforge
description: Robotics-engineer skills: ROS 2, VLA / LeRobot policies, Isaac Lab, manipulation, humanoid WBC, perception, real-hardware deployment discipline.

interface.longDescription: Roboforge surfaces robotics-specific skills: ROS 2 patterns, LeRobot/VLA conventions, Isaac Lab workflows, manipulation primitives, humanoid WBC, perception, and the discipline you want before deploying anything on real hardware.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up a ROS 2 node.
I need to deploy this policy on real hardware.
